channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Over a week damp this bin, 4th May
item.description:
Someone bring this full litter bin I’ve a week ago and even I reported few dats ago still here , on top that people throw litter day by day passing by , why you don’t want pick up tr bin? Lately you drive me mad you never show up

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marcon Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping, 4th May
item.description:
Pile of dumped waste including a mattress/duvet, cardboard box, drinks cans, and plastic bottles accumulated against a wooden fence.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holyoak Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped orange road barrier, 4th May
item.description:
Visible dumped orange road barrier (ISP brand) leaning against a wooden fence with a detached base weight on the ground.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holyoak Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins overflowing and rats running around, 4th May
item.description:
The bins are overflowing and I’m seeing rats running around

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Foulden Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Significant fly-tipping, 4th May
item.description:
Very disappointing to see significant fly-tipping along the road. There are numerous large and small items dumped, this needs urgent attention.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Churchbury Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag, 4th May
item.description:
At the junction of Augustine Road And Edmunds Avenue theres a green sweeper bag on the corner can you please remove before the foxes rip it open.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15A,15B, Augustine Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 46A residents flytipping, 4th May
item.description:
The previous residents of 46A moved out over the weekend and left this parting gift, can it please be removed? They should be fined and/or prosecuted accordingly

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evering Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and detrius, 4th May
item.description:
On Augustine Road by the R4 bus stop there's a lot of detrius around the bus stop and in the channels also on the opposite side of the road to bus stop theres litter and detrius on the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Augustine Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing Bins - 6th report, 4th May
item.description:
This is now my sixth report regarding the overflowing dog waste bins in my area, and the situation is frankly unacceptable. The bins are consistently left unattended, resulting in dog waste being scattered across the street. It’s unhygienic, unpleasant, and reflects poorly on local services. After six reports, I would expect this issue to have been properly addressed—not repeatedly ignored. Please take immediate and lasting action to resolve this.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tents set up in the woods, 4th May
item.description:
Homeless people camping in the woods
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southborough Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No indication of roundabout when driving towards Crook Log, 4th May
item.description:
I am 87 years old and live alone. The roundabout is visible from my property. Every day there are 3 or 4 near misses on the roundabout. Cars attempting to turn right into Brampton Road are regularly forced to undertake emergency stops because traffic going towards Crook Log are oblivious to the fact that they need to give way to the right. I have already had one car plough through my lounge wall: a very frightening and costly experience. Every time I hear a screech of brakes and the sound of horns, I get very nervous. Additionally, the roundabout itself and stop lines are not as prominent as the junction warrants
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brampton Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obstructing footpath., 4th May
item.description:
Obstructing footpath so people have to bend to walk past.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravenscroft Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas bottles dropped on The Green, 4th May
item.description:
These are a hazard and cannot be put in regular bins These are opposite my house number 14 The Green Bexleyheath

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Ennerdale Road, Upper Belvedere, Bexleyheath, Greater London
